name: HVA Unit IoT Intelligent Valve
desc: IoT flow balance valve for centralized cooling/heating networks. Integrates temperature sensing, M-Bus/RS485/NB-IoT/4G/LoRa for whole-network hydraulic balance.
overview: The HVA IoT Intelligent Valve is designed for centralized chilled water and district heating networks. It connects to the cloud via M-Bus, NB-IoT, 4G or LoRa and performs real-time hydraulic balancing across building units — adjusting valve position based on return temperature to prevent over-cooling / over-heating. Large built-in battery (38,000 mAh) provides years of wireless operation.
features: High-precision 40Cr steel gear train: more durable than powder metallurgy — high torque, low loss
Large motor starting torque with low temperature rise — reliable cold-start in low-ambient conditions
Default M-Bus communication; selectable NB-IoT / 4G / RS485 / LoRa without hardware change
Integrated on-site manual switch and position scale — valve position readable and adjustable without tools
SS304 high-strength valve body and ball — superior corrosion and wear resistance for long service life
Monthly auto-exercise (optional): prevents scale build-up and mechanical seizure
Valve retains last position on power failure or communication loss — safe fail-stay behaviour
1% aperture step adjustment, 0–100% full-range proportional control
